creator: matthew@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Dani from comment #2)
No worries.  I don't mind being pinged about this, it's just a slightly odd way you've chosen to do it.

You make a good point about the upgrade path for large installations.

The next step here would be to generate some patches to update the port to 2.4.1
-- that way the maintainer can either approve them, or we can wait for the maintainer timeout and then apply them.

Is that something you feel you could have a go at?  If not I'll try and take a look this evening.
